Verse 25

mystery

(See Scofield "Matthew 13:11"). The "mystery" here is the Church; Ephesians 3:1-9.

Verse 26

obedience

See margin ref., (See Scofield "Romans 1:5"). Faith as a system, in contrast with law as a system.
